summary: Round 17 is Beanie for Brain Cancer Round with eight games from Thursday 25 June to Sunday 28 June. The strongest raw tips are Panthers over Cowboys, Roosters over Broncos and Raiders over Dragons, but no Round 17 charity bet is locked and the Mark Hughes Foundation ledger remains 3-2 and +$0.53.

sources.label: NRL teams Round 17: Jackson Ford ruled out 10-12 weeks
NRL Late Mail Round 17: Alex Twal rehab, Samuela Fainu return watch
2026 NRL season results: Round 17 fixture table

scoreboard.note: Lowest-confidence opener. Parramatta get Mitchell Moses and home field, but South Sydney's Cody Walker, Cameron Murray, Brandon Smith and David Fifita profile gives them the narrow attacking edge.
Canterbury are the quality lean with Connor Tracey, Stephen Crichton, Lachlan Galvin, Max King and Leo Thompson named. Titans confidence is real after the Panthers upset, so this stays a trap.
Roosters have the cleaner spine with Tedesco, Daly Cherry-Evans, Sam Walker, Reece Robson and Victor Radley. Brisbane regain Walsh, Staggs and Haas, but Ezra Mam is out.
Dolphins regain major strike and middle power after the rest cycle. Warriors remain structured but lose Jackson Ford for 10-12 weeks and are still without Roger Tuivasa-Sheck.
Strongest raw tip. Penrith name Dylan Edwards, Brian To'o, Nathan Cleary, Isaah Yeo and Liam Martin, while North Queensland still list Jaxon Purdue and Jake Clifford in the halves.
Storm class lean through Munster, Grant and Loiero, but 4 Pines and Tom Trbojevic make this a dangerous away favourite spot.
Canberra get the GIO edge and a stronger forward platform through Horsburgh, Tapine, Hudson Young, Hosking and Brailey. Dragons are improved but still need a road proof point.
Newcastle get the home-spine edge with Kalyn Ponga, Fletcher Sharpe and Dylan Brown. Tigers regain Adam Doueihi and Alex Twal but lose Jock Madden and Patrick Herbert.

liveAlerts.text: Round 17 Beanie for Brain Cancer preview is live with eight games and the Sharks on the bye.
Charity ledger remains 3-2, $31.50 invested, $32.03 returned and +$0.53 settled profit.
No Round 17 charity bet is locked; do not move the ledger without a fresh TAB price, stake and user confirmation.
Strongest raw Round 17 tip: Panthers over Cowboys with Penrith's senior spine named.
Most dangerous Round 17 reads: Eels v Rabbitohs, Sea Eagles v Storm, Titans v Bulldogs and Knights v Tigers.
Sharks are on the Round 17 bye.
